title: Magnets
description: No items, no enchantments. You simply pull, teleport or collects items and XP orbs.
body:
The mod adds ability to draw items and XP orbs to the player. No funny items, no enchantments.

The mod was intended for ***standalone play only***, not for multiplayer. Not tested on any servers.

The items nearby are either pulled or teleported to the player or directly collected into the inventory. This is *configurable*.

You can change the collection *range* in the mod config.

You can turn it on and off with a *hotkey*, by default ` = `, also configurable.

You can additionally turn on and off collection of *XP orbs*.
